channel.title: Recent page changes from site "SCP Foundation" (a Wikidot site)

item.title: "The Mekhanics of La Rue Part Two" - title change
item.description:
Page: The Mekhanics of La Rue Part Two (the-mekhanics-of-la-rue-part-2)
Current revision number: 1
Date changed: Sat, 09 Jan 2021 20:19:19 +0000
Change type: title change
By: BlueJones

Page content preview:
« La Rue Macabre » The thing about a city like La Rue Macabre is that legends and rumors spread like wildfire. When a fishing boat said it would be the first to chart out the whole of La Rue, m...

Page content preview:

Date changed: Sat, 09 Jan 2021 14:44:01 +0000
Change type: source change
Change comments: Adding css comment
By: Nagiros

Page content preview:
It's Now & Never: a reverie endeavor Awaits somnambulant directives To take the helm. Believe me, darling: The stars were made for falling! Like melting obelisks as tall as another...

Date changed: Sat, 09 Jan 2021 05:16:45 +0000
Change type: source change

“Grandpa, could you tell me a story?” “Of course, my little princess. But make sure to brush your teeth before going to bed.” “I've already done it. Look, grandpa.” “Your teeth look just like pear...
